name: Menu Final Fix & Host Mode Sync
audit_findings: v2.4.6 failed because index.html still had Rival before Reglas
Difficulty block was id=machine-level-label / machine-level, not difficulty
App uses matchMode='five' for fast mode, not 'fast'
Previous audits were too abstract and did not match DOM/value names
changes: Static HTML reordered: Reglas before Rival
Difficulty block replaced with hidden machine-level normal select
No default rules/rival placeholders in hidden selects
Rival is disabled until rules selected
Fast hard safety accepts five or fast
not_changed: Core local gameplay except menu gating and fast penalty safety
